def negative_python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_logger_created_per_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_logger_created_per_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag getLogger or adapter construction per request when stable module loggers are enough."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
